_meta.title: BREVIO Authoritative Blueprint Manifest
_meta.description: Enumerates the 7 mandatory blueprints that define the BREVIO platform target state. Filenames and document titles are non-authoritative; only blueprint_id and content hash are binding.
_meta.authority: Blueprint intent overrides current code per pipeline execution rules.

blueprints.label: V9 Consolidated Master Blueprint
blueprints.description: Core platform architecture: services, schemas, workflows, policies, persistence, observability.

blueprints.label: V9.1 Soft Intelligence Layer Addendum
blueprints.description: Learning consolidation, autonomy trust scoring, daily capture, mission control, soft intelligence features.

blueprints.label: V9.2 Production Hardening Addendum
blueprints.description: Production hardening, security, supply-chain, deployment, observability, infrastructure closure.

blueprints.label: V10 Complete Blueprint
blueprints.description: Federation, wallet, cost tracking, capability registry, authorization receipts, gap closure.

blueprints.label: V10.1 Admin Intelligence Blueprint
blueprints.description: Admin dashboard, workspace health, KPI reporting, alert rules, operations monitoring.

blueprints.label: OpenClaw Skills Integration Blueprint
blueprints.description: OpenClaw Hands runtime adoption, skill corpus migration, TS skill execution contract.

blueprints.label: OpenClaw Unified Blueprint v1.0.1
blueprints.description: Unified OpenClaw specification consolidating skill runtime, versioned contract, and integration tests.

non_mandatory_supplemental.note: V10.2 Intelligence addendum — informs BP09 but not independently mandatory.
V10.3 Cognitive Intelligence — informs BP09 but not independently mandatory.
V10.4 Voice & Calling — informs BP09 but not independently mandatory.
4-Features addendum — subsumed by V10 gap closure.
General addendum — subsumed by version-specific blueprints.
Blueprint addendum (42 skills) — subsumed by OpenClaw blueprints.
